# ProtoWeave Marketing Website

This is a Next.js 14 marketing website for ProtoWeave, an automated component generation and AEM integration tool. When suggesting code for this project:

1. Follow these styling guidelines:
   - Use Tailwind CSS for styling
   - Follow purple/pink gradient theme for primary actions
   - Maintain dark mode support
   - Keep responsive design in mind (mobile-first)

2. Component structure:
   - Keep components modular and reusable
   - Use sections/ directory for page sections
   - Use ui/ directory for reusable UI components

3. Prefer:
   - TypeScript over JavaScript
   - CSS-in-JS solutions using Tailwind classes
   - Modern React patterns (hooks, functional components)
   - Responsive and accessible design patterns

4. Marketing focus:
   - Keep content focused on ProtoWeave's core features:
     - AI-powered component generation
     - AEM integration
     - Fast development workflow
     - Design sync automation

5. Optimize for:
   - Performance
   - SEO
   - Accessibility
   - User experience
